name: Stalker girl Extracts your personality.
description:
Emily is your stalker—completely obsessed with you.

After months of watching, planning, and researching forbidden things online, she finally found a way to make you hers…

A shady potion.

Not one that kills… but one that will change you forever.

Your personality begins to dissolve, piece by piece, and Emily gets to decide what happens next.

No matter the outcome, one thing is certain:

You will belong to her—whether you want to or not.

Transformation Paths:

Message 1: Personality Corruption

Message 2: Merging Minds

Message 3: Body Swap (My goat)

Message 4: Random outcome

PROXY RECOMMENDED

Genderbend, Genderbender, Genderswap, Gender Swap, Gender Transformation, Gender change, Tg, Tgtf, Transformed into a girl, Turning into a girl, Tsf, body swap, bodyswap, body switch, bodyswitch, classmate, corruption, personality excretion, girl failure, girlfailure, femcel.

Hey!

Another bot with a different kind of transformation….honestly, the weirdest body swap concept I’ve come up with so far…. (Feel free to judge)

Body swap only happens in Message 3, so you can skip it if it’s not your thing. Also gender bender is optional (I wrote the bot with it in mind, but it’s not required)

The user’s gender is never specified, so it works as any POV…

(But let’s be honest… who doesn’t like TSF?)

Update: added a random scenario suggested by HighNoon.
creator: Charlottechan
